title: Alligator - Bluey Scratch Art Set for Kids, Activities, Gifts, and Book
features: IMMERSE IN BLUEY'S ADVENTURES: Delve into the colorful world of Bluey with the Scratch Art Set. Use your wooden stylus to scratch away and unveil vibrant colors, capturing the spirit and fun of Bluey's adventures.

TWO BLUEY-THEMED HIDDEN PICTURES: Uncover 2 delightful Bluey-inspired hidden pictures as you scratch. Each reveal showcases scenes from the beloved show, adding an extra touch of magic to the artistic journey.

THE MAGIC OF SCRATCH ART: Scratch art isn't just fun—it's magical! As you scratch away the surface, brilliant colors emerge, creating mesmerizing artworks that delight both kids and adults alike. It's a tactile and visual treat for the senses!

WOODEN STYLUS WITH BLUEY DETAIL: The included wooden stylus features a unique Bluey design, making it a cherished tool for young fans. It ensures each scratch brings to life the warmth and joy synonymous with Bluey.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL ART SET FOR CREATIVITY: This Scratch Art Set is more than just a single activity. Beyond scratch art and Bluey adventures, it encourages kids to explore their creativity. Whether drawing, detailing, or imagining new stories, it's a versatile addition to any young artist's collection.
description: Product Description Dive into creative fun with ALLIGATOR's Bluey Scratch Art Set! Uncover 2 hidden pictures featuring your favorite Bluey characters, using the included wooden stylus to scratch away and reveal vibrant colors beneath. Each scratch unveils a world of colorful surprises, bringing Bluey's imaginative adventures to life right before your eyes. Perfect for young artists and Bluey fans, this scratch art set offers a magical combination of creativity and discovery. Grab your wooden stylus, scratch away, and watch as colorful masterpieces emerge, adding a splash of excitement to any creative playtime! Safety Warning Warning! Small Parts, Choking Hazard.
